channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped household and garden rubbish, 3rd May
item.description:
Dumped household and garden rubbish. This is now happening so regularly. Please can a camera be installed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Sir John Old Castle pub in Greville Street, 3rd May
item.description:
Electrical wires of street lighting dangerously exposed and creating a health and safety risk. Grateful if this can be fixed as soon as possible
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29-35, Greville Street, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Laughing gas, 3rd May
item.description:
Cannisters everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middle Park Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste bags dumped, 3rd May
item.description:
In gutter by parking bay by tree near corner of Sundridge Ave/Ashmore Grove.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Easy one, 3rd May
item.description:
Fly tipped today 3/5 .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watlington Grove, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet dumped, 3rd May
item.description:
Hello this carpet has been dumped all week outside a house on County Grove, close to the junction with Baldwin Crescent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): County Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tv boxes left on road, 3rd May
item.description:
Address of fly tipper is on box, across the road from where the rubbish was left

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Avondale Rise, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full width dip in the road, 3rd May
item.description:
This dip has recently been fixed but I feel like it's been left worse. It's like a reverse speed hump. And very deep.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian sign is facing wrong way, 3rd May
item.description:
The pedestrian green and red man lights outside the old bike project shop are facing the wrong way. They should be facing towards across the other side of the camberwell road on park side. Please come to fix them?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wyndham Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd May
item.description:
Fly tipping near the entrance to Gilbert's Pit on Pound Park Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pound Park Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation impeding pedestrians, 3rd May
item.description:
Vegetation consistently encroaching on to footway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two sofas abandoned, 3rd May
item.description:
Need removal

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Terrible pothole by Weir Road. Ruts in road due to weight of electric bus means cars undercarriage are scraping along road, 3rd May
item.description:
Combination of increased weight of electric buses plus very poor road condition and very poor fixing means road is terrible. Why are buses in this small side road? No bus stop here? Could be rerouted to wider road where buses can keep on one side or the other rather than down centre of road. TFL and council should work together

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radbourne Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped mattress in street, 3rd May
item.description:
A double mattress has been dumped in the street on Bostall Lane near to the junction with Federation Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Lane, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 3rd May
item.description:
Skip owner regularly parking here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redcross Way, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in same place on Brook Lane, 3rd May
item.description:
Fly tipping in same place on Brook Lane. Is it possible to place signage about flytipping fines and/or add a trail type camera? This spot has recurrent fly-tipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severe damage to play equipment, 3rd May
item.description:
This has been here for over 2 weeks. It is next to a primary school & is very busy. It’s dangerous & the temporary preventative measures taken not adequately preventing children from accessing the area which could lead to a serious accident. It needs fixing properly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wrotham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti written on Bexley Park Sign, 3rd May
item.description:
The Parish park sign as you enter from the Parish Gate carpark has graffiti on - could it please be removed. There is also excessive rubbish starting to appear as we move towards the warmer weather. Is it possible to have more rubbish collecting or more keep the park tidy signs. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34-44, Parish Gate Drive, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 3rd May
item.description:
Dumped outside #2

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Felton Lea, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree requires pruning, 3rd May
item.description:
Tree’s lower branches require pruning before it affects the public pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tremaine Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
